'''Shardra''' was an [[Outlaw tech/Legends|outlaw tech]] working in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. She was in grease up to her elbows tweaking a [[Spice/Legends|spice]] freighter's [[Alluvial damper/Legends|alluvial dampers]] when she met [[Klaus Vandangante/Legends|Klaus "Doc" Vandangante]], and the two mechanics immediately fell in love. Shardra introduced Doc to her profession, which he adopted. Eventually, they had a daughter, [[Jessa Vandangante]]. Shardra died in a fuel dump explosion, leaving Doc to raise their daughter.
